case_title: BEVERLY JANE PAYNE VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING CO., INC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-26-2007 CONTINUED TO MAR-09-2007 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge.
James P. Nevin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Beverly Jane Payne.
Order granting waiver of appearance of witness on file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal $470.40
Costs $399.27, for a total of $869.67
Judgment signed in open court.
